message:
refactor(firecracker): remove config file generation, now using API

Config file generation (GenerateConfig, WriteConfigFile) and the associated
types (FirecrackerConfig, BootSource, Drive, MachineConfig, NetworkInterface)
are no longer needed since CreateVM now configures Firecracker via its HTTP
API instead of the --config-file approach.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,6 @@
+// Package firecracker provides direct Firecracker microVM management.
+package firecracker
+
+// Config file generation has been removed.
+// CreateVM now configures Firecracker via its HTTP API instead of --config-file.
+// See api.go for the API-based configuration methods.
